en.title: Code Interpreter
en.prompt: I would like you to serve as a code interpreter, and elucidate the syntax and the semantics of the code line-by-line.
en.remark: Let AI explain the function of each line of code. Contributed by @Tractor1928 and @yiqiongwu.

related.title: Code Anything Now
related.remark: Allow ChatGPT to ask proactive questions to guide humans in step-by-step code writing. Collected from Snackprompt, shared by @fuxinsen.

related.title: WeChat Mini Program
related.remark: Auxiliary WeChat mini program development. Contributed by @gandli.

related.title: SQL Expert
related.remark: Answer SQL-related questions or output standard SQL statements. Contributed by @lovedworking.

metaDescription: Confused by code? Get line-by-line explanations of syntax and semantics. Understand logic and function clearly without execution.

faq.q: How accurate is the AI's code logic explanation?
faq.a: Standard usage of mainstream languages is accurate. Framework internals (React hooks internals, Django ORM N+1) are often oversimplified or wrong. After getting explanations of critical sections, cross-check official docs, especially for low-level mechanics. Don't rely on AI alone.

faq.q: Can it explain assembly or legacy code like Fortran or COBOL?
faq.a: Yes, but assembly instruction sets differ (x86 / ARM / RISC-V), so specify the target architecture. For legacy code (COBOL, Fortran 77) the overall direction is accurate; for specific business logic you'll need to supply the original business context for the AI to give good context.
